headline: Broadcom Extends AI And Broadband Reach With New 50G Home Gateway SoC
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced the BCM68850, described as the industry's first 50G ITU-PON home gateway SoC. The chip integrates a neural processor on the device and supports Wi-Fi 8 for home networking. The launch highlights Broadcom's push to extend its AI and connectivity portfolio into residential broadband gateways.
